rationale: In the Experiment 1 methods section, the authors explicitly cite Wertenbroch and Skiera (2002) when describing their BDM-based elicitation procedure ("for a similar protocol"). This is not just general background; it anchors how they implement incentive-compatible willingness-to-pay measurement in their own experiment. The cited work is used as a practical methodological precedent, while the paper's main theory and hypotheses come from a different line of argument.
relation_description: The citing paper applies the elicitation approach used in Wertenbroch and Skiera (2002) as a methodological template for collecting incentive-compatible reservation prices in its experiments. The citation supports procedure design rather than extending or challenging the cited paper's core claims.
